heroSubtext: No hidden fees. No surprises. Choose a plan that fits your goals and let's build something great together.
sectionSubtext: Every plan includes free hosting. All websites are custom-designed, mobile-first, and performance-optimised.

plans.label: STARTER
plans.name: Essentials
plans.tagline: Perfect for individuals & small businesses getting online for the first time.
plans.bestFor: Freelancers, tutors, market stalls, pop-up businesses

plans.label: STUDIO
plans.name: Growth
plans.tagline: For growing businesses wanting a polished, complete web presence.
plans.bestFor: Salons, restaurants, fitness coaches, local services

plans.label: PRO
plans.name: Premium
plans.tagline: Complete digital solution for established businesses ready to scale.
plans.bestFor: Clinics, retail chains, real estate, tourism operators

customDescription: Don't see exactly what you need? Every project is unique — whether it's a web app, CRM integration, or a fully bespoke platform, we scope and price it together.
